snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. Lyrics:

রাসূল নামের ফুল ফুটেছে মরু সাহারায় 
কে নিবিরে সুবাস তাহার আয়রে ছুটে আয় ।।

মরুর ধুলি পাগল পাড়া 
দরুদ পড়ে চাঁদ সি তারা।।
কে এলো রে কে এলো রে ধুলির ও ধরায়, 

মধু তো নয় মধুর নহর নামলো দুনিয়ায়
তব নূরের রৌশনীতে নূরানী চমকায়।।
বুলবুলিদের কণ্ঠে শুনি এলো সে এক মহা গুণী
অজ্ঞতাকে দূর করিবে জ্ঞানও পিপাসায়,

ধ্যানে মগ্ন পেয়ারা নবী ভাবনা ছিলো তার
কেমন করে করবে সে ধুর জাহিলি আধার।।
হেরার আলোর রৌশনিতে 
সে আলোকে সরিয়ে দিতে,
পাথর আঘাত সইলো নবী ক্ষত কলিজায়,
